textByHash.444372d5d204630e748c736709e2df9880d4dc9f: Ah, they are doing drills! Getting ready for the invasion. What a glorious day that will be!
textByHash.de0d89884c18f3af01c268d11ee0d5c51b080c8b: Yes, yes, I know we all get excited. But, I need you to get out of the way. Move along!
textByHash.52e9260e4756476ee86ada3108c958b967334ede: We will fly quietly into the night...and destroy them all!
textByHash.6c581edb689d4a36e1ec7e1237526ce40b8ad013: No slacking! Slackers will be punished.
